title: Universal jammer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Jammer}}
The '''universal jammer''' was a countermeasure to most types of [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]]. It could foil most common types of detectors, but was vulnerable to certain specialized scanners. They were highly expensive. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] used a suitcase with a universal jammer in it to conceal the armor and weapons he had inside the suitcase.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-10-26 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
